{{CargoOrgan
|name=HF Pacemaker
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10815
|idx=16
|description=This is an electronic therapeutic device implanted in the body that stimulates the heart muscle by generating electrical impulses, causing the heart to dilate and contract!
|skill=
|hp=1526
|def=96
|atk=76
|rush=93
|gene1=When in Mecha Form:
> Gain +2% Tool Chests in explorations
|gene2=The Time Machine: +3% chance to drop
Time Chests
|gene3=In explorations, {race} HP +200
|gene7=When in Mecha Form:
> Gain +2% Tool Chests in explorations (Awakened)
|}}
